intro.label: Lommin
intro.title: Take control of your spending
intro.body1: Lommin connects directly to your bank accounts and credit cards and gives you a clear picture of your spending — categorised and always up to date.
intro.body2: All data is stored locally on your device. Nothing is shared with any third parties.

pick.title: Get started
pick.subtitle: How would you like to use Lommin?

bank.title: Connect bank accounts
bank.description: Sync directly from your bank via Enable Banking

import.title: Import
import.description: Historical data from Spiir or your own files

restore.title: Restore
restore.description: From a local file or Google Drive backup

demo.title: Try demo
demo.description: Explore Lommin with synthetic test data — no account needed

bankExplain.title: Connect bank accounts
bankExplain.body: Lommin uses Enable Banking to fetch transactions directly from your accounts or cards. You need a free Enable Banking account and a signing key.

bankProxy.title: CORS proxy
bankProxy.body: To use Enable Banking, all API calls must be sent through a proxy. The default proxy is hosted by Lommin and could in theory see transaction data and access tokens in transit. For full control you can use your own proxy.

bankPem.title: Import signing key
bankPem.body: Upload the <pem>.pem</pem> file from Enable Banking, or paste the contents directly.

bankConfirm.title: Confirm App ID
bankConfirm.body: The App ID was extracted from the filename. Verify it matches the ID in the <link>Enable Banking dashboard</link>. On mobile, the filename may sometimes change automatically.

importPick.title: Import data
importPick.subtitle: Choose the source for historical transactions.

fromSpiir.title: From Spiir
fromSpiir.description: Import CSV or ZIP export from Spiir

fromOwn.title: From your own data
fromOwn.description: Import your own CSV files and other formats

importOwn.title: Import from your own data
importOwn.body: Import transactions from your own CSV files and other sources.

restore.title: Restore
restore.body: Decrypt and restore accounts and transactions from a previous backup.

fromFile.title: From local file
fromFile.body: Decrypt an <enc>.enc</enc> backup from your device.
fromFile.passwordPlaceholder: Leave blank if you didn't use a password

fromDrive.title: From Google Drive
fromDrive.body: Download and decrypt your backup from Google Drive.
fromDrive.passwordPlaceholder: Leave blank if you didn't use a password

errors.encrypted: File is encrypted with a password.
errors.loadDriveFailed: Failed to load from Google Drive

demo.title: Try demo
demo.body: Explore all features of Lommin with synthetic test data. No real data is uploaded or stored externally. You can exit the demo at any time.
demo.hasDataError: You already have data. Delete existing data in settings before starting the demo.
